Mortality Map

2019

🚧 Status: Work-in-progress

Overview

An exploration of global mortality data, presentated using various geospatial data visualisations. Mortality Map was started before COVID-19, but due to the influence of the pandemic upon the World Health Organisation (WHO) mortality database, the project is undergoing a redesign.

© 2022 Myles Lewando
